extDescription.message: Cast the current tab's stream to a DLNA or Google Cast device on your local network.

pickerPrompt.message: Choose where to cast the current tab

helperHint.message: Install the local helper, or start it and retry.

helperOutdated.message: A new helper version is available.

errDrm.message: This stream is DRM-protected, so it can't be cast.

errStreamUnavailable.message: Couldn't open this stream. It may be offline, region-locked, or unsupported.

needTokenHint.message: Paste the helper's token in the options.

optionsHelp.message: Paste the helper's token. You'll find it in the file ~/.streaming-lan-cast/token in your home folder (the helper also prints it on startup).

noSourceFound.message: No video source detected. Play the video and try again.

enableDetectHint.message: Enable source detection, then reload the page and try again.

detectEnabledReload.message: Detection enabled. Reload the page (or start the video), then cast.
